info.title: DashAdmin Reporting API
info.description: API for fetching analytical data and reports from DashAdmin. Requires API Key authentication.

get.description: Fetches analytical data for a specific club. The response structure depends on the `query` parameter. Use `query=revenue` for financial data and `query=shifts` for operational shift data.

parameters.name: clubId
parameters.description: The ID of the club to get a report for. This ID should be taken from the user's context, specifically from the 'id' field of the 'selected_club' object, or from the 'id' of an object within the 'available_clubs' array.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The type of data to fetch.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: A predefined time period for the report. Overridden by startDate/endDate.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for a custom period (YYYY-MM-DD). Requires endDate.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for a custom period (YYYY-MM-DD). Requires startDate.

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Filter report by a specific employee's UUID.

parameters.name: shiftType
parameters.description: Filter revenue report by shift type. Only applicable when `query=revenue`.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter shifts report by status. Only applicable when `query=shifts`.

200.description: Successful response. The data structure depends on the `query` parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid Authorization header.

403.description: Forbidden. The provided API Key is invalid.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication for external services like n8n. The key should be provided in the Authorization header as a Bearer token.

RevenueReport.description: Financial summary for the requested period.

ShiftsReport.description: Operational summary of shifts for the requested period.
